expectations.text: The agent checks whether psycopg2 and matplotlib are installed before running the chart script
expectations.evidence: Agent did not check — it assumed deps were missing based on user's statement and went straight to advice; no actual dependency check was attempted

expectations.text: The agent provides the correct pip install command: pip install psycopg2-binary matplotlib
expectations.evidence: Agent provided 'pip install psycopg2-binary' as one of the options, along with virtual environment suggestion

expectations.text: The agent does NOT silently fail or show a Python traceback without explanation
expectations.evidence: Agent gave a helpful response but had 2 shell permission errors before settling on text-only advice
